heading: Structuring transactions to evade reporting requirement prohibited
label: 5324 Structuring transactions to evade reporting requirement prohibited

children.heading: .—Domestic Coin and Currency Transactions Involving Financial Institutions
children.label: a .—Domestic Coin and Currency Transactions Involving Financial Institutions

children.text: cause or attempt to cause a domestic financial institution to fail to file a report required under section 5313(a) or 5325 or any regulation prescribed under any such section, to file a report or to maintain a record required by an order issued under section 5326, or to maintain a record required pursuant to any regulation prescribed under section 21 of the Federal Deposit Insurance Act or ;section 123 of Public Law 91–508

cause or attempt to cause a domestic financial institution to file a report required under section 5313(a) or 5325 or any regulation prescribed under any such section, to file a report or to maintain a record required by any order issued under section 5326, or to maintain a record required pursuant to any regulation prescribed under section 5326, or to maintain a record required pursuant to any regulation prescribed under section 21 of the Federal Deposit Insurance Act or , that contains a material omission or misstatement of fact; orsection 123 of Public Law 91–508
structure or assist in structuring, or attempt to structure or assist in structuring, any transaction with one or more domestic financial institutions.

children.heading: .—Domestic Coin and Currency Transactions Involving Nonfinancial Trades or Businesses
children.label: b .—Domestic Coin and Currency Transactions Involving Nonfinancial Trades or Businesses

children.text: cause or attempt to cause a nonfinancial trade or business to fail to file a report required under section 5331 or any regulation prescribed under such section;

cause or attempt to cause a nonfinancial trade or business to file a report required under section 5331 or any regulation prescribed under such section that contains a material omission or misstatement of fact; or
structure or assist in structuring, or attempt to structure or assist in structuring, any transaction with 1 or more nonfinancial trades or businesses.
fail to file a report required by section 5316, or cause or attempt to cause a person to fail to file such a report;
file or cause or attempt to cause a person to file a report required under section 5316 that contains a material omission or misstatement of fact; or
structure or assist in structuring, or attempt to structure or assist in structuring, any importation or exportation of monetary instruments.

children.heading: .—In general
children.label: 1 .—In general
children.text: Whoever violates this section shall be fined in accordance with title 18, United States Code, imprisoned for not more than 5 years, or both.

children.heading: .—Enhanced penalty for aggravated cases
children.label: 2 .—Enhanced penalty for aggravated cases
children.text: Whoever violates this section while violating another law of the United States or as part of a pattern of any illegal activity involving more than $100,000 in a 12-month period shall be fined twice the amount provided in subsection (b)(3) or (c)(3) (as the case may be) of , United States Code, imprisoned for not more than 10 years, or both.section 3571 of title 18
